allow: Bash(node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const f=JSON.parse\(d\).tool_input.file_path||'';if\(f.includes\('data/'\)\){process.stderr.write\('BLOCKED: direct edits to data/ files are not allowed. Invoice records are source-of-truth \\u2014 use lib/reconciliation.js instead.\\n'\);process.exit\(2\);}else process.exit\(0\);}\)")
